notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor doubles (8) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jacob Young. Cole Young scores. Fielding error by center fielder Jacob Young.

notableEvents.label: Dylan Crews GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Crews grounds into a double play, shortstop Colt Emerson to first baseman Josh Naylor. Luis García Jr. out at 2nd. Dylan Crews out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Victor Robles singles on a ground ball to shortstop CJ Abrams. Victor Robles to 2nd. Victor Robles advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Emerson Hancock on the pickoff attempt.
